book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve middle eastern food and should be in the centre
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves chinese food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 3 people at 13:30 on thursday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the same area as the restaurant
The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should include free parking
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 5 nights starting from the same day
If the booking fails how about 3 nights
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
